name: uqff
summary: UQFF Star-Magic v5.61.1: Phase E deferred-work cleanup patch — PAPER_1218 + PAPER_1801 PDF LaTeX builds fixed (percent escape + Unicode sanitize + text underscore normalization); PAPER_1087 pinned to Sec.3 table value -0.9435 with explicit OPEN_QUESTION marker; PAPER_872 augmented with DPM shell-transition mechanism (26 shells to Fe, 14 to Si); CP1 audit: 99.2 percent functional or by-design, only 11 real bugs found; 4 fixed (3 NameError F_UQFF_factor typo + RedDwarf OverflowError guard). Gate 1031/0.
author: Daniel T. Murphy
